package repository

import "context"

// PermissionsRepository is a draft repository boundary for permissions.
// Keep runtime implementations behind platform repository ports before copying this draft.
type PermissionsRepository interface {
	List(ctx context.Context, query PermissionsQuery) ([]Permission, error)
}

type PermissionsQuery struct {
	Keywords []string
	Page int
	PageSize int
}
